ohtani.title: Ty France hits three-run home run in Padres' win
ohtani.blurb: Ty France hits a three-run home run and Walker Buehler strikes out five batters in the Padres' 7-1 victory over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Dansby Swanson's four RBIs aids Cubs' win
imanaga.blurb: Dansby Swanson collects four RBIs in the Cubs' 10-5 victory over the Mets

suzuki.title: William Contreras' monster homer leads to Brewers win
suzuki.blurb: William Contreras' 449-foot homer and Jacob Misiorowski's eight strikeouts lift the Brewers to a 6-2 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Caleb Durbin's home run propels Red Sox past Yankees
yoshida.blurb: Caleb Durbin clubs a two-run homer and Connelly Early strikes out nine to propel the Red Sox past the Yankees, 6-3

okamoto.title: Eovaldi, Foscue propel Rangers to 5-4 win
okamoto.blurb: Nine strikeouts from Nathan Eovaldi and a three-RBI game from Justin Foscue lead the Rangers to a 5-4 win over the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Ty France hits three-run home run in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Ty France hits a three-run home run and Walker Buehler strikes out five batters in the Padres' 7-1 victory over the Dodgers
